debug_info.goal:
A : Finset ℕ
N : ℕ
hAN : A ⊆ range N
hA : ThreeAPFree ↑A
⊢ ∃ c > 0, ↑A.card ≤ ↑N / exp (-c * log ↑N ^ 12⁻¹)

failed_attempts:
by
  refine ⟨1, one_pos, ?_⟩
  have hcard : #A ≤ N := by
    calc #A ≤ #(range N) := card_le_card hAN
    _ = N := card_range N
  have hexp_pos : 0 < exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := exp_pos _
  by_cases hN : N = 0
  · simp [hN, card_eq_zero.mpr (subset_range_zero_iff.mp (hN ▸ hAN))]
  · have hN_pos : (0 : ℝ) < N := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hN)
    have h1 : (N : ℝ) ≤ N / exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := by
      rw [le_div_iff hexp_pos]
      calc (N : ℝ) * exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) 
          ≤ N * 1 := by {
            apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (le_of_lt hN_pos)
            exact exp_le_one_of_nonpos (by nlinarith [rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (by linarith : 1 ≤ (N : ℝ))) (12⁻¹ : ℝ)])
          }
        _ = N := mul_one _
    calc (#A : ℝ) ≤ N := Nat.cast_le.mpr hcard
      _ ≤ N / exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := h1

    _ = N / exp (-(log N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ))) := by rw [exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]

      _ ≤ ↑N / exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12 : ℝ)⁻¹) := by
          apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left _ hNpos.le hexp_pos
          have : -1 * log ↑N ^ (12 : ℝ)⁻¹ ≤ 0 := by
            simp only [neg_one_mul, neg_nonpos]
            apply rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (by linarith : 1 ≤ (N : ℝ)))
          exact exp_le_one_iff.mpr this
⟨1, one_pos, by positivity⟩

by
  use 1, one_pos
  by_cases hN : N = 0
  · simp only [hN, range_zero, subset_empty] at hAN
    simp [hAN]
  · have hcard : #A ≤ N := by
      calc #A ≤ #(range N) := card_le_card hAN
        _ = N := card_range N
    have hN_pos : (0 : ℝ) < N := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hN)
    have hexp_pos : 0 < exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := exp_pos _
    calc (↑#A : ℝ) ≤ ↑N := Nat.cast_le.mpr hcard
      _ = ↑N / 1 := by ring
      _ ≤ ↑N / exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := by
        apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hN_pos.le hexp_pos
        rw [neg_mul, one_mul, exp_neg]
        apply inv_le_one_of_one_le_of_nonneg
        · exact one_le_exp (rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (by linarith : 1 ≤ (N : ℝ))) _)
        · exact le_of_lt (exp_pos _)

by
  refine ⟨1, one_pos, ?_⟩
  have hcard : #A ≤ N := by
    calc #A ≤ #(range N) := card_le_card hAN
    _ = N := card_range N
  by_cases hN : N = 0
  · simp [hN]
  · have hN' : (0 : ℝ) < N := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hN)
    have hexp : 0 < exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := exp_pos _
    rw [le_div_iff' hexp]
    calc exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) * ↑(#A) 
        ≤ 1 * ↑(#A) := by
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
          rw [neg_one_mul]
          exact exp_le_one_of_nonpos (neg_nonpos.mpr (rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (by linarith : 1 ≤ (N : ℝ))) _))
      _ = ↑(#A) := one_mul _
      _ ≤ ↑N := Nat.cast_le.mpr hcard

by
  use 1, one_pos
  by_cases hN : N = 0
  · simp only [hN, range_zero, subset_empty] at hAN
    simp [hAN]
  · have hN' : (N : ℝ) ≥ 1 := Nat.one_le_cast.mpr (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hN)
    have hcard : #A ≤ N := card_le_card hAN |>.trans (by simp)
    have hexp : exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) ≤ 1 := by
      apply exp_le_one_iff.mpr
      nlinarith [rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg hN') (12⁻¹ : ℝ)]
    calc (A.card : ℝ) ≤ N := Nat.cast_le.mpr hcard
      _ = N / 1 := by ring
      _ ≤ N / exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := by
          apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left _ (exp_pos _) hexp
          exact Nat.cast_nonneg N
